name: Your Alley
description:
This is your alley, and people come through. The rest is up to you. Are you a pimp, dealer, vigilante, homeless, gang leader, killer, or what? You choose and the AI will generate encounters.

It’s up to you how you handle whoever steps in your alley, and you’ll get more infamous with every encounter, drawing more.

Become rich by robbing everyone, plunge the city in fear as a serial killer, recruit some hoes to make you cash, give people shelter and build a community in your alley, scam rob threaten or seduce your way through everyone, it’s all up to you!
creator: Tevin Anarchy
